title: Immersive Autopilot
description: This mod enable players to use an autopilot-like program when in using the mod "Immersive Aircraft".
body:
**Introduction**

This mod adds some special blocks and items to provide players with a way to control planes without manual controllers. It enables players to control aircraft by using autopilot or waypoint guidance, making flight control easier.

**Mod usage**

- Use the tower block to set up waypoints and control the area.
- Combining a radar block with a tower block enhances the tower block's control distance, autopilot speed control, and more.
- Use the items provided in the mod to enhance certain planes and the tower block (radar block).

![A player using Autopilot to drive a bipplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be8d2ca111e9cc9896b02f207b3e5848af30055_0.webp)

To learn how to use this mod more detailed, please go to [Immersive Autopilot wiki](https://github.com/Hgit-1/ImmersiveAutopilot/wiki)
